title: SDM UI Lib
description: A simple library that will simplify the creation of interfaces
body:
This library is designed to simplify the creation of interfaces
Designed to replace FTB Library in SDM mods

## What are the features
- RGB/RGBA
- Drawing primitives such as triangles, squares, circles
- Simplified interaction with rotation, scale, and render priority
- Render Items, Entity, ~~Blocks~~ on GUI
- Containers that allow you to animate elements
- Lots of widgets
- The ability to place objects in an area with random positions, rotations and sizes
- And more
